body_preview: Extract the state memory synthesis subsystem (~435 lines, lines 12553–12987) from the monolithic `commands_state.rs` (23,648 lines) into a dedicated `commands_state_memory.rs` module. This reduces structural debt and makes state memory logic independently testable. Why this matters: `commands_state.rs` is 17% of the codebase (23,648 lines, 451 items) — the m
title: Extract state memory synthesis from commands_state.rs
